markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on holiday content, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Holiday Content:** Growth X will provide 5 extra articles for the Dec 22–Jan 5 holiday period, labeled "holiday reserve" in Airtable. The team advised staggering posts to avoid low-traffic days.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Performance:** November traffic is slow, but average search position is climbing. The "Sales Email Template" page continues to dominate traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**CMS Migration:** The site is migrating from Craft to Webflow. Growth X will advise Outreach's team (Paul, Andrew, Kendra) on Webflow SEO best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**New Workflow:** Growth X will now create header images for content refreshes, standardizing the blog's visual style.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)

## Topics

### Holiday Content Plan

  - [**Goal:** Create a content buffer for the holiday period (Dec 22–Jan 5).](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Plan:** Growth X will deliver 5 extra articles.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This covers the week of Dec 22 (when Outreach is off) and Growth X's "quiet week" (Dec 29).](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [**Scheduling Advice:** Stagger posts to avoid low-traffic days (e.g., Christmas week).](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
      - [**Exception:** Time-sensitive 2026 forecasting pieces should be published before New Year's.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [**Labeling:** Articles will be labeled "holiday reserve" in Airtable titles for easy identification.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### November Performance Snapshot

  - [**Overall:** Traffic is slow so far in November.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Positive Metric:** Average search position continues to climb.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Top Non-Branded Queries:**](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
      - ["research agent"](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
      - ["MED page"](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**Top Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - ["Sales Email Template" (dominates traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - ["Sales Prospecting Email"](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
      - ["Sales Follow-Up Email"](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)

### Product Launch & Messaging

  - [**Launch Focus:** Optimizing existing features, not launching a new product.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [**Key Features for Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [Smart Forecast Assist](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [Team Outcome Performance Reports](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [**Action:** Outreach to provide details on feature improvements for blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Brand Messaging Update:** Hadassah will share new brand messaging from PMMs once approved.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures all content, including upcoming landing pages, is aligned.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

### Craft to Webflow Migration

  - [**Status:** Migration from Craft to Webflow is in its final procurement stages.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Paul and Andrew (Outreach's digital marketing team) will provide more details next week.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [**Growth X's Role:** Advise Outreach on Webflow SEO best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Outreach wants to leverage Growth X's expertise as a Webflow client.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
      - [**Validation:** Hadassah will ask Marcel (Growth X) about Webflow's organic traffic strategies to validate Growth X's value.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)

### New Workflow: Header Images for Refreshes

  - [**Request:** Outreach asked Growth X to create header images for content refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
  - [**Decision:** Approved. Growth X will create new, standardized header images for all future refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=1182.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Ensures visual consistency across the entire blog.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [**Scope:** Applies to new refreshes only, not a retroactive update of all past content.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jenn:**](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

      - [Align with Megan on the landing page optimization strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=1162.0)
  - [**Outreach Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Review and approve the next batch of content topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
      - [Provide details on the "Smart Forecast Assist" and "Team Outcome Performance Reports" features.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [Share the new brand messaging once approved by PMMs.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [**Paul & Andrew (Outreach):**](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [Provide a timeline and more details on the Webflow migration during next week's call.](https://fathom.video/share/x73HJNRbqj-9-s5W_M4-iYyyzKKaEtDY?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
